name: adult small & mini savory stew with beef & vegetables dog food
description: hill's science diet adult small paws savory stew with beef & vegetables is a delicious way to provide precisely balanced nutrition that enhances the overall health and well-being of your small or toy dog. made with real meat, brown rice, and a medley of delectable vegetables all smothered in tasty gravy. high-quality protein for lean muscles made with purposeful ingredients for a flavorful, nutritious meal easy-to-digest
